race.comment: TEMPTED (9) one of the top sprinting fillies in the land kept fresh for this. Had an arduous task getting the upper hand with a head win in the G1 Surround over 1400m at this track. Can sit off the fast tempo and launch late from the perfect draw. MARHOONA (8) multiple Group 1 winner who sat on the fast tempo with a determined victory over 1100m in the G1 The Galaxy at Rosehill. Has the speed to get across from the draw and not without top-four claims. BEIWACHT (1) talented colt who jumped in grade and trip with a fading sixth to Autumn Glow in the G1 George Ryder Stakes over 1500m at Rosehill. Well placed back to his own age group and will give them something to catch over this trip. DEVIL NIGHT (2) desperate for a change of luck and today could be the day from the inside gate. Made late ground with a close third over 1200m in the G1 William Reid Stakes at Caulfield. No shock to see him win this. SKYHOOK (4) never happy in the shifty conditions first-up with the 58.5kg. Respect.
